name: Tvp® Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve Vegex or bouillon cube in boiling water.
2. Stir in Spike, onion powder, and Gravy Master until combined.
3. Add the mixture to 1 cup of dried TVP and soak for 10 minutes.
4. In a separate pan, sauté diced onion in oil over medium heat.
5. Drain the soaked TVP mixture and add it to the pan with onions.
6. Stir in chili powder, garlic powder, pepper, oregano, and soy sauce.
7. Gradually mix in white flour until well incorporated.
8. Form the mixture into three patties and fry in a small amount of oil until browned on each side.
9. Serve on whole wheat roll or pita pocket with favorite toppings.
Judges' comments: These made a scant three burgers. For two or more people, you might want to make more than one batch.
